source.title: MTHFR 677C→T polymorphism and risk of coronary heart disease: meta-analysis
source.finding: MTHFR 677TT genotype associated with 16% increased CHD risk. Folate supplementation may mitigate.

TT.effect: ~70% reduced MTHFR enzyme activity. Elevated homocysteine. Impaired folate metabolism.
TT.recommendation: Supplement with methylfolate (not folic acid). Monitor homocysteine levels.

CT.effect: ~35% reduced MTHFR activity. Mildly elevated homocysteine risk.
CT.recommendation: Consider methylfolate supplementation. Ensure adequate dietary folate.

CC.effect: Normal folate metabolism and MTHFR enzyme activity.
